* Punch the ceiling | E3MOM 21min

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 500m run, 25 wall balls, 3 rope climbs. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
